footer.brandDescription: Your go-to pet shop. Toys, accessories & grooming for your beloved companion.

cookie.title: We use cookies
cookie.description: We use functional cookies to ensure the website works properly. We would also like to place analytical and marketing cookies to improve your experience. You can choose which cookies to accept.
cookie.functionalDescription: Required for the website to function, such as the shopping cart and login.
cookie.analyticsDescription: Help us understand how visitors use the website so we can improve it.
cookie.marketingDescription: Used to make ads more relevant and measure the effectiveness of campaigns.

hero.title: Make your pet
hero.subtitle: Toys, accessories & grooming your pet will love. Fast worldwide delivery.

whyPawsNL.title: Why PawsNL?
whyPawsNL.subtitle: Why thousands of pet lovers choose us
whyPawsNL.reason1Description: Every product is tested by our team. Only the best for your pet.
whyPawsNL.reason2Description: Top quality doesn't have to be expensive. Great value guaranteed.
whyPawsNL.reason3Description: Free shipping over €35. Fast worldwide delivery.
whyPawsNL.reason4Description: Questions? Our team is always ready to help. 30-day hassle-free returns.

reviews.title: What our customers say
reviews.subtitle: Real reviews from happy pet owners
reviews.review1Text: The snuffle mat for our labrador Buddy is amazing. He can play with it for half an hour! Delivery was quick and well packaged.
reviews.review2Text: The LED collar works perfectly for our evening walks with Max. Great quality for the price. Highly recommend!
reviews.review3Text: My cat Luna absolutely loves the cat tunnel. Great quality for the price, and lovely customer service when I had a question.

newsletter.successMessage: Check your inbox! We've sent you the guide.
newsletter.noSpam: No spam. You can unsubscribe at any time.

confirmation.shippingDescription: We will ship your order within 1-2 business days. Once your package is on its way, you will receive a tracking code by email.

aboutUs.metaDescription: Learn more about PawsNL and our passion for pets.
aboutUs.heroDescription: PawsNL was founded by pet lovers, for pet lovers. We carefully select the best products so your loyal companion always gets the best.
aboutUs.ourStoryP1: PawsNL was born from a simple frustration: why is it so hard to find good, affordable pet products? The same products everywhere at high prices — while there is so much more choice internationally.
aboutUs.ourStoryP2: That is why we founded PawsNL. We search worldwide for the best products for dogs, cats and small pets. Every product is carefully selected for quality, safety and value for money.
aboutUs.ourStoryP3: As a Dutch webshop, we stay close to our customers. Have a question? You always get a personal answer — no chatbot, no waiting queue.
aboutUs.quote: A happy pet makes a happy home.
aboutUs.valueSustainabilityText: We consciously choose eco-friendly packaging and work with suppliers that prioritise sustainability.
aboutUs.valueQualityText: Every product is thoroughly checked before it enters our range. No compromises when it comes to the health of your pet.
aboutUs.valueAnimalWelfareText: We support local animal shelter projects and donate a percentage of every sale to animal welfare organisations.
aboutUs.whySelectedText: We test and check every product before it enters the shop. No junk, only quality.
aboutUs.whyPricesText: No inflated prices. We buy directly from suppliers and pass the savings on to you.
aboutUs.whyShippingText: Orders over €35 are shipped free. Delivered within 7-14 business days with track & trace.
aboutUs.ctaDescription: Discover our range and give your pet the best it deserves.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with PawsNL. We are happy to help!
contact.heroDescription: Have a question or comment? We are happy to help!
contact.quickResponseText: We usually respond within 24 hours on business days.
contact.successDescription: Thank you for your message. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or send us an email.

faq.metaDescription: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about ordering, shipping, returns and more at PawsNL.
faq.heroDescription: Quickly find answers to the most frequently asked questions about ordering, shipping, returns and more.
faq.orderQ1: How do I place an order?
faq.orderA1: Ordering at PawsNL is very simple! Choose the products you want, add them to your cart and proceed to checkout. Fill in your details, choose a payment method and confirm your order. You will receive a confirmation email immediately.
faq.orderA2: Yes, you can! Contact us within 24 hours of placing your order via info@pawsnlshop.com. We will cancel your order and refund the full amount. After 24 hours, your order may already be in processing and can unfortunately no longer be cancelled.
faq.shipA1: Delivery takes an average of 7 to 14 business days. Our products are shipped from an international warehouse, which means delivery times may be slightly longer than local shops. We do everything we can to deliver your order as quickly as possible.
faq.shipQ2: How much are the shipping costs?
faq.shipA2: For orders over €35, shipping is completely free! For orders under €35, you pay only €4.95 in shipping costs.
faq.shipA3: Yes, once your order has been shipped, you will automatically receive an email with a track & trace code. You can use this to track the status of your package at any time.
faq.returnQ1: How do I return a product?
faq.returnA1: You can return a product within 30 days of receiving it. Contact us at info@pawsnlshop.com with your order number and the reason for the return. We will then send you the return instructions.
faq.returnQ2: When will I get my money back after a return?
faq.returnA2: After we have received and checked your return, the amount will be refunded to your account within 5 to 7 business days via the same payment method you used.
faq.payQ1: Which payment methods do you accept?
faq.payA1: We accept iDEAL, Bancontact, Visa and Mastercard. So you can always pay in a way that suits you.
faq.payQ2: Is it safe to pay at PawsNL?
faq.payA2: Absolutely! All payments are processed through Stripe, one of the most trusted payment platforms in the world. Your data is secured with SSL encryption and we never store your payment details.
faq.prodQ1: Are the products safe for my pet?
faq.prodA1: Yes, all products in our range are carefully checked for quality and safety. Our team reviews every product before it enters the shop, so you can order with confidence.
faq.prodQ2: Where do the products come from?
faq.prodA2: Our products come from selected international suppliers. Our team carries out quality checks to ensure every product meets our high standards.
faq.prodA3: You can reach us by email at info@pawsnlshop.com or via the contact form on our website. We usually respond within 24 hours on business days.
faq.ctaDescription: Feel free to contact us. We are happy to help!

returnPolicy.metaDescription: Return policy of PawsNL. 30-day return policy on all our pet products.
returnPolicy.heroDescription: Not satisfied? No problem. At PawsNL you can easily return products within 30 days.
returnPolicy.conditionsP1: You have the right to return your order up to 30 days after receipt, without giving a reason. This is longer than the statutory cooling-off period of 14 days, because we want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase.
returnPolicy.conditionsP2: To be eligible for a return, the product must:
returnPolicy.conditionsItem1: Be unused and in its original condition
returnPolicy.conditionsItem2: Be in the original, undamaged packaging
returnPolicy.conditionsItem3: Be complete with all included accessories and labels
returnPolicy.requestP1: Want to return a product? Send an email to <email>info@pawsnlshop.com</email> with the following details:
returnPolicy.requestItem2: Which product you wish to return
returnPolicy.requestItem3: The reason for the return (optional, but helps us improve)
returnPolicy.requestP2: We will then send you a confirmation with the return instructions and the return address.
returnPolicy.costsP1: The costs of return shipping are at the expense of the customer, unless the product was delivered defective or damaged. In that case, we will of course reimburse the return costs.
returnPolicy.costsP2: Did you receive a defective or damaged product? Please contact us as soon as possible at <email>info@pawsnlshop.com</email> and include a photo if possible.
returnPolicy.refundP1: After receipt and inspection of the returned product, we will process the refund within 5 to 7 business days. The amount will be refunded via the same payment method you used to place the order.
returnPolicy.refundP2: You will receive a confirmation email once the refund has been processed. Please note that depending on your bank, it may take an additional 1-3 business days before the amount is visible in your account.
returnPolicy.exceptionsP1: Unfortunately, the following products cannot be returned:
returnPolicy.exceptionsItem1: Hygiene products where the seal has been broken
returnPolicy.exceptionsItem3: Products that have been custom made or personalised
returnPolicy.exceptionsItem4: Products that have clearly been used
returnPolicy.exceptionsP2: Not sure if your product is eligible for return? Feel free to contact us. We are happy to help.
returnPolicy.ctaDescription: Our customer service is available on business days from 09:00 to 17:00.

shippingPolicy.metaDescription: Shipping policy of PawsNL. Free shipping over €35. Delivery in 7-14 business days.
shippingPolicy.heroDescription: We ensure your order is delivered safely and as quickly as possible to your door.
shippingPolicy.costsP1: Shipping costs are calculated automatically at checkout. If your order exceeds €35, shipping costs are automatically set to €0.00.
shippingPolicy.deliveryP1: The average delivery time is 7 to 14 business days after confirmation of your order. Our products are shipped directly from the warehouse to you, allowing us to offer competitive prices.
shippingPolicy.deliveryP2: The expected delivery time may vary depending on:
shippingPolicy.deliveryItem1: The type of product and availability
shippingPolicy.deliveryItem3: Busy periods at the delivery service (e.g. holidays)
shippingPolicy.trackP1: Once your order has been shipped, you will receive an email with a track & trace code. You can use this to track the status of your package at any time.
shippingPolicy.trackP2: Haven't received a track & trace code? Check your spam folder or contact us at <email>info@pawsnlshop.com</email>.
shippingPolicy.areaP2: Shipping to other countries is currently not yet available. Keep an eye on our website for future expansions.
shippingPolicy.delaysP1: In exceptional cases, delivery may take longer than expected, for example due to high demand, holidays or unforeseen circumstances with the carrier.
shippingPolicy.delaysP2: Should there be a delay, we will proactively contact you by email to keep you informed. Your order is always in good hands.
shippingPolicy.notReceivedP1: Haven't received your package after 15 business days? Please contact us at <email>info@pawsnlshop.com</email> with your order number. We will investigate and find a solution, whether that is a new package or a refund.
shippingPolicy.ctaDescription: Our customer service is happy to help you with questions about your order.

privacyPolicy.metaDescription: Privacy policy of PawsNL. Read how we handle your personal data.
privacyPolicy.heroDescription: We handle your personal data with care. Below you can read exactly what we collect, why, and what your rights are.
privacyPolicy.whoP1: PawsNL is an online shop specialising in pet products. We are based in Gorinchem and registered with the Dutch Chamber of Commerce.
privacyPolicy.dataCollectedP1: When you place an order or contact us, we collect the following personal data:
privacyPolicy.dataItem3: Delivery address (street, house number, postcode, city, country)
privacyPolicy.dataItem5: Payment details (processed via Stripe; we do not store these ourselves)
privacyPolicy.dataUsageTitle: What do we use your data for?
privacyPolicy.dataUsageP1: We use your personal data solely for the following purposes:
privacyPolicy.usageOrderDesc: to process, ship and keep you informed about the status of your order
privacyPolicy.usageServiceDesc: to answer your questions and resolve any issues
privacyPolicy.usageLegalDesc: to comply with tax and accounting requirements
privacyPolicy.usageMarketingDesc: only with your explicit consent, we send you offers and newsletters. You can unsubscribe at any time
privacyPolicy.securityP1: We take the protection of your data seriously and implement appropriate measures to prevent misuse, loss and unauthorised access:
privacyPolicy.securitySSLDesc: all communication with our website is secured via HTTPS
privacyPolicy.securityStripeDesc: payments are securely processed via Stripe, a certified PCI DSS Level 1 payment provider. We never store your credit card or bank details
privacyPolicy.securityAccessDesc: only authorised personnel have access to personal data
privacyPolicy.cookiesP1: Our website uses cookies to improve your experience. We use the following types of cookies:
privacyPolicy.cookiesFunctionalDesc: necessary for the website to function, such as remembering your shopping cart
privacyPolicy.cookiesAnalyticalDesc: to gain insight into how visitors use our website so we can improve it. This data is processed anonymously
privacyPolicy.cookiesP2: You can disable cookies via your browser settings. Please note: disabling functional cookies may limit the functionality of the website.
privacyPolicy.thirdPartyP1: We never sell your data to third parties. We only share your data with parties necessary for our services:
privacyPolicy.rightsP1: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:
privacyPolicy.rightAccessDesc: you can request which data we hold about you
privacyPolicy.rightRectificationDesc: you can request to have your data corrected
privacyPolicy.rightErasureDesc: you can request to have your data deleted
privacyPolicy.rightPortabilityDesc: you can request to receive your data in a readable format
privacyPolicy.rightObjectionDesc: you can object to the processing of your data
privacyPolicy.rightsP2: Would you like to exercise one of these rights? Send an email to <email>info@pawsnlshop.com</email>. We will respond to your request within 30 days.
privacyPolicy.retentionP1: We do not retain your personal data longer than necessary for the purposes for which they were collected. We retain order data for a maximum of 7 years in accordance with the statutory retention obligation.
privacyPolicy.changesP1: We reserve the right to change this privacy policy. The most recent version is always available on our website. We will notify you of significant changes.
privacyPolicy.ctaDescription: Feel free to contact us if you have questions about how we handle your data.

terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions of PawsNL. Read the conditions that apply to all orders.
terms.heroDescription: Below you will find the terms and conditions that apply to all orders and services of PawsNL.
terms.art1P1: These terms and conditions apply to every offer from PawsNL and to every distance contract concluded between PawsNL and the customer.
terms.art1P2: By placing an order through our webshop, you agree to these terms and conditions. We recommend that you read these terms carefully before placing an order.
terms.art1P3: If one or more provisions of these terms are invalid or voidable, the remaining provisions shall remain in full force and effect.
terms.art3P1: All prices on our website are listed in euros and are inclusive of VAT.
terms.art3P2: The offer contains a complete and accurate description of the products offered. Obvious mistakes or errors in the offer do not bind PawsNL.
terms.art3P3: We reserve the right to change prices and the product range at any time. Orders already placed are not affected by price changes.
terms.art3P4: Shipping costs are €4.95 for orders under €35. Orders of €35 or more are shipped free of charge.
terms.art4P1: The agreement is established when you place an order and the payment has been successfully processed. You will receive an order confirmation by email.
terms.art4P2: PawsNL reserves the right to refuse an order or impose additional conditions, for example in case of suspected fraud or an unreasonably large order.
terms.art5P1: Payments are securely processed via Stripe. We offer the following payment methods:
terms.art5P2: Payment is made at the time of placing the order. We do not store any payment details; this is handled entirely by Stripe.
terms.art6P1: The delivery time is on average 7 to 14 business days after receipt of payment. We ship to the Netherlands, Belgium and Germany.
terms.art6P2: In case of a delivery delay, you will be informed as soon as possible by email.
terms.art6P3: The risk of damage or loss of products lies with PawsNL until the moment of delivery to the customer or a pre-designated representative.
terms.art7P1: The statutory cooling-off period is 14 days. At PawsNL, however, we offer you an extended return period of 30 days. Within this period, you can cancel the agreement without giving a reason.
terms.art7P2: To exercise your right of withdrawal, send an email to <email>info@pawsnlshop.com</email> with your order number and the product you wish to return.
terms.art7P3: After receipt and inspection of the returned product, we will refund the purchase amount within 5 to 7 business days. The costs of return shipping are at the expense of the customer, unless the product is defective.
terms.art7P4: The right of withdrawal is excluded for:
terms.art7Item1: Hygiene products where the seal has been broken
terms.art8P1: Do you have a complaint about a product or our service? Please contact us as soon as possible, preferably within 48 hours, at info@pawsnlshop.com.
terms.art8P2: Please include your order number, a clear description of the complaint and any photos as evidence in your email. We aim to handle complaints within 5 business days.
terms.art8P3: If we cannot reach an agreement, you can submit your complaint to the European Online Dispute Resolution (ODR) platform: <odr>ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr</odr>.
terms.art9P1: PawsNL is not liable for damage resulting from incorrect use of the products. We always recommend reading the product description and instructions for use carefully.
terms.art9P2: The liability of PawsNL is in all cases limited to the amount the customer paid for the product in question.
terms.art9P3: PawsNL is not liable for damage resulting from force majeure, including but not limited to delays by carriers, strikes, natural disasters or internet disruptions.
terms.art10P1: Dutch law applies to all agreements between PawsNL and the customer.
terms.art10P2: Disputes arising from or related to an agreement shall be submitted to the competent court in Rotterdam, unless the law prescribes another court.
terms.art11P1: PawsNL reserves the right to amend these terms and conditions. The most recent version is always available on our website. We will inform our customers of significant changes.
terms.ctaDescription: Have questions or comments? Our team is ready to help.

complaints.metaDescription: Complaints procedure of PawsNL. Read how to file a complaint and how we handle it.
complaints.heroDescription: Not satisfied? We take every complaint seriously and do our best to find a suitable solution together.
complaints.step1P1: Do you have a complaint about a product, order or our service? Please contact us as soon as possible, preferably within 48 hours of discovering the problem.
complaints.step1P3: Always include the following in your message:
complaints.step1Item2: A clear description of the complaint
complaints.step2P1: After receiving your complaint, we will send an acknowledgement of receipt by email within 1 business day. In this email, we confirm that your complaint has been received and give an indication of the processing time.
complaints.step3P1: We aim to fully handle every complaint within 5 business days. In some cases, this may take longer, for example if we need to request information from our supplier. In that case, we will keep you informed of the progress.
complaints.step3Item3: A discount code for a future order
complaints.step3Item4: Another suitable solution by mutual agreement
complaints.step4Title: Step 4 — Not satisfied with the solution?
complaints.step4P1: If we cannot reach an agreement, you as a consumer can make use of the European Online Dispute Resolution (ODR) platform. This platform was established by the European Commission and offers an accessible way to resolve disputes.
complaints.odrDescription: Through the ODR platform, you can file a complaint about an online purchase. The platform is available in all official EU languages.
complaints.promiseP1: At PawsNL, we treat every complaint confidentially and with respect. We also use complaints as learning opportunities to continuously improve our products and service.
complaints.promiseItem1: Every complaint is registered and retained for 2 years
complaints.promiseItem2: We strive for fair and quick resolution
complaints.promiseItem3: Your complaint is always treated confidentially
complaints.promiseItem4: We learn from complaints and adapt our processes where needed
complaints.ctaDescription: Send us an email with your order number and description. We respond within 1 business day.
